title: lathyrus formosus
intro: Lathyrus formosus, also known as the Formosan pea or wild pea, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus formosus include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it accessible for use in various forms of traditional and modern herbal medicine.
